title: frangula riojae
intro: Frangula riojae, also known as the Rioja buckthorn or Spanish buckthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Frangula riojae has been found to have a laxative effect due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The medicinal properties of Frangula riojae have been used to support digestive health and promote regular bowel movements, making it a natural remedy for constipation and other gastrointestinal issues. Frangula riojae can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects and provide additional health benefits.
